The Warrens.description: Fog sits knee-deep in the alleys. Night Pits are quieter than usual.

Markets Infinite.description: Unusually pleasant morning in the Markets. Crowds are larger. Pickpockets are busier.

Sanctum Quarter.description: Cold air has escaped. The temperature has dropped sharply.

Grand Forum.description: Cold air has escaped. The temperature has dropped sharply.

Guild Spires.description: Good visibility from the upper Guild Spires. Someone's doing something on the roof.

Outer Wall.description: Gate District is freezing. Wall Quadrant C reports frost on the inner seal. FTA is aware.
